notableEvents.label: Richie Palacios plunked
notableEvents.detail: Richie Palacios hit by pitch. Chandler Simpson to 3rd. Ben Williamson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Yandy Díaz plunked
notableEvents.detail: Yandy Díaz hit by pitch. Chandler Simpson scores. Ben Williamson to 3rd. Richie Palacios to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee singles on a line drive to center fielder Cedric Mullins. Matt Wallner scores. Ryan Jeffers to 3rd. Brooks Lee to 2nd. Fielding error by center fielder Cedric Mullins.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee singles on a line drive to center fielder Cedric Mullins. Matt Wallner scores. Ryan Jeffers to 3rd. Brooks Lee to 2nd. Fielding error by center fielder Cedric Mullins.

notableEvents.label: Ben Williamson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ben Williamson grounds into a double play, shortstop Brooks Lee to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Josh Bell. Cedric Mullins scores. Chandler Simpson out at 2nd. Ben Williamson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Royce Lewis. Chandler Simpson to 2nd. Chandler Simpson advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Royce Lewis.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee singles on a line drive to center fielder Cedric Mullins. Matt Wallner scores. Ryan Jeffers to 3rd. Brooks Lee to 2nd. Fielding error by center fielder Cedric Mullins.
